emails.subject: Updates
emails.body: Updates Any updates on Louisville Gas Electric and LCRA?

emails.subject: Updates
emails.body: Updates Any updates on Louisville Gas Electric and LCRA?

emails.subject: Re: Updates
emails.body: Re: Updates Just spoke with Elizabeth on them. Both Louisville Gas and Electric Company and Lower Colorado River Authority are denied access to view or trade US Power Products on EOL by Legal. Any questions, please direct them to me. Thanks, Shari Tana Jones 09/06/2000 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Updates
